response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C/C++ (National Instruments), distributed systems, and high-performance applications. However, his background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) and scripting (Python, Dlang), with limited focus on C++ for industrial automation or cloud platforms. His exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) is not evident, and his architecture experience appears more product-oriented than industrial-systems focused.
strengths: Extensive hands-on C++ experience (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby)
Strong problem-solving and technical mentorship background (Refactoring Dojos, Code Katas, teaching workshops)
Proven ability to design scalable, event-driven systems (Geo-Data platform, microservices at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited direct experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, etc.) or MQTT/REST for IoT applications
No clear evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) implementation per IEC 62443-4-1 standards in past roles
Primary expertise in Node.js/TypeScript and web stack, with limited recent focus on C++ for performance-critical systems
